holdings.infoBox: XCHG is an equity ETF with a total of 588 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.97%, Microsoft at 5.39%, Apple at 5.13%, Amazon.com at 4.68%, and Alphabet at 4.21%.

overview.description: The AB US Equity ETF (XCHG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in equity securities of US companies across mid- and large-cap segments. The fund aims for long-term capital appreciation XCHG was launched on Dec 12, 2025 and is issued by AB Funds.
